results.title: IAEA produces global map of used nuclear fuel
results.description: The global total of used nuclear fuel produced by nuclear power plants is about 448,000 tonnes of heavy metal, with three quarters in storage and one quarter reprocessed, according to the International Atomic Energy Agency's first interactive tool showing how much used nuclear fuel the world has - and where it is now stored.

results.title: IAEA produces global mapping tool of used nuclear fuel
results.description: The global total of used nuclear fuel produced by nuclear power plants is about 448,000 tonnes of heavy metal, with three quarters in storage and one quarter reprocessed, according to the International Atomic Energy Agency's first interactive tool showing how much used nuclear fuel the world has - and where it is stored - by country.

results.title: Brits refuse to give up on holidays abroad
results.description: The British population's appetite for international travel stays strong despite domestic economic adversity and global instability.

results.title: Tbaytel awards $30K to local organizations
results.description: Tbaytel has awarded $10,000 grants to three local organizations.
